home.title: Artisan Instruments from Bolivia
home.subtitle: Handcrafted with tradition
home.metaDescription: Discover handcrafted Bolivian artisan instruments. Charangos, Ronrocos, and Walaychos made with traditional craftsmanship.
home.editorialDesc: Every charango, ronroco, and walaycho we craft is the result of weeks of artisanal work. The wood, the strings, and the sound are chosen with the precision of someone who knows the soul of the Andes.
home.ctaDesc: Explore our complete collection of handmade charangos, ronrocos, and walaychos from Bolivia.
home.showcase1Desc: The secret to a sweet, resonant, and deep sound lies in the rigorous selection of the finest Andean woods. Each piece is cut at the perfect grain angle and naturally cured for years before being sculpted by the luthier.
home.showcase2Title: The Harmony of Steel & Nylon Strings
home.showcase2Desc: The traditional Bolivian charango has an unmistakable timbre of ten strings arranged in five double courses. At Artesena, we calibrate each instrument with absolute precision to guarantee lasting tuning and exquisite harmonic resonance in every strum.
home.woodTitle:
When creating,
I have always
let myself be
guided by
the wood

products.title: Our Instruments
products.metaDescription: Browse our collection of handcrafted Bolivian instruments. Discover authentic charangos, ronrocos, and more artisan pieces.

checkout.title: Complete Purchase
checkout.addressHelper: Please provide a complete street address including building number and any apartment or floor reference for international delivery from Bolivia.

about.title: About Us
about.metaDescription: Learn about Artesena, dedicated to preserving traditional Bolivian instrument craftsmanship. Handcrafted charangos, ronrocos, and walaychos.
about.philQuote: "Every instrument is a fragment of the Andean soul, carved with love and delivered to the world."
about.philDesc: Founded in the heart of Bolivia, Artesena was born from the desire to preserve and share the musical richness of the Andes with the entire world.
about.col1Desc: It all started in the Andean valleys...
about.missionDesc: Our mission is to be the bridge between the master luthiers of Bolivia and musicians around the world.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with Artesena for inquiries about our handcrafted Bolivian instruments.
contact.metaDescription: Contact Artesena for inquiries about handcrafted Bolivian instruments. Charangos, Ronrocos, and Walaychos made with traditional craftsmanship.
